originalTitle: Cathie Wood buys $38.1 million of tumbling megacap stock
summary: Cathie Wood, chief of Ark Investment Management, is known for buying “disruptive” tech stocks during market pullbacks. That’s what she just did, adding one of her highest-conviction investments, Tesla, as the stock fell more than 7% in a day. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF gained 35.49%, ...

chineseTitle: Cathie Wood 买入价值 3810 万美元的暴跌巨型股
chineseSummary: 方舟投资管理公司（Ark Investment Management）首席执行官凯西·伍德（Cathie Wood）以在市场回调期间购买“颠覆性”科技股而闻名。这就是她刚刚所做的，增加了她最有信心的投资之一特斯拉，因为该股一天内下跌了 7% 以上。 2025年，旗舰方舟创新ETF上涨35.49%，...

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
